text: carbs is 0.3g. but the real story is the context, not the nutrition profile.

pros first. excellent swap for sugary drinks because the raw nutrition is tiny, but the replacement value is very real. clear real-world role because if a misc item helps or harms behavior, that matters a lot. context tells the real story because that is the whole point of misc.

on the weaker side. caffeine still needs managing because useful, but not free of trade-offs. easy to overrate or misuse because this category attracts strong marketing and habits. better replacements often exist because that practical comparison matters.
Black Tea is B tier. Best treated as a context item rather than a nutritional cornerstone.
